generated_oml:
instance IncubatorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor connected via 1-wire bus in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Temperature readings transmitted via 1-wire bus to RabbitMQ communication server"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IncubatorTemperatureSensor
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature readings from thermal incubator sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetectionAlgorithm, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SimulationEngine
]

instance ThermalIncubatorGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design model for thermal incubator physical dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEngine
]

instance ThermalIncubatorAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model formulated via differential equations for system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEngine, Optimizer
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for model parameter adjustment using non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Sensor networks for real-time data collection via 1-wire bus"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MonitoringSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring systems for safety checks and operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ControlService
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms for identifying system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimators for determining system state from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizers for adjusting operational parameters to achieve optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engines leveraging differential equations for dynamic system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService, DynamicModelingService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and optimal performance through sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemSafetyStatusInsight, OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of dynamic behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational parameters using optimizers"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParametersInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control via supervisory controllers for adjusting physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustPhysicalTwinAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection capabilities for identifying system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for determining current system state"
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimatedStateInsight
]

instance DynamicModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic modeling for decision-making support"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicModelInsight
]

instance SystemSafetyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current safety status of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational efficiency metrics derived from system monitoring"
]

instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted system behavior under current conditions"
]

instance OptimizedParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized operational parameters for system performance"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected faults in the thermal incubator system"
]

instance EstimatedStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance DynamicModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from dynamic thermal modeling for decision support"
]

instance AdjustPhysicalTwinAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of physical twin parameters based on DT insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorPhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical thermal incubator system designed for precise temperature control applications"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin representation of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing physical and digital twin components for thermal incubator system"
    base:contains ThermalIncubatorPhysicalTwin, ThermalIncubatorDigitalTwin
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller on the Raspberry Pi listens to the RabbitMQ server for commands to control the fan and heatbed. Command types include fan and heatbed control instructions. Message formats and validation mechanisms are not explicitly detailed. Feedback systems and command execution confirmation details are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates calibration algorithms to update Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environmental models with real-time sensor data, monitoring systems to evaluate system safety and optimality, and human or algorithmic interventions for Physical Twin adjustments when violations are detected, forming a framework that combines modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses a RabbitMQ server for message brokering and a 1-wire bus for sensor connectivity, supporting multiple sensors on a single GPIO. Network topology consists of a Raspberry Pi hosting RabbitMQ connected to sensors via 1-wire bus. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The RabbitMQ server is deployed on the Raspberry Pi itself, indicating edge computing hosting. Computational and storage requirements are minimal for the Raspberry Pi. Scalability mechanisms and availability/reliability assurances are not detailed in the document."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain a safe state, and monitors check whether the system is performing safely and optimally."
]
